text: A district court struck a pro se plaintiff’s Rule 59(e) motion and sanctioned her $5,000 under Rule 11 after finding she "generated each brief using AI." The filings contained at least 13 hallucinated cases, quotations, and statements of law and fact.
deployer: Pro se plaintiff Ifeoma Delliane Chinedu Obi
mitigation_gap: No verification of AI-generated content; repeated violations after notice.
reliance_or_harm: Multiple filings riddled with fabricated authority; motion struck.
